title: What to know about frozen shoulder before using medicinal herbs
intro: Certain herbal teas offer traditional remedies for alleviating the discomfort of frozen shoulder. Ginger tea, known for its potent anti-inflammatory properties, can help reduce inflammation in the affected shoulder area. Turmeric tea, containing curcumin, is another excellent choice as it effectively decreases pain and stiffness. Additionally, cayenne pepper tea, which features capsaicin, provides relief by increasing blood flow and soothing sore muscles. Lastly, willow bark tea, a natural source of salicin, often serves as a gentle painkiller, making it a popular choice for managing the symptoms of frozen shoulder.
definition: Frozen shoulder, medically known as adhesive capsulitis, is a condition characterized by stiffness and severe pain in the shoulder joint, restricting movement and functionality. This immobility can hinder daily activities such as dressing, driving, and even sleeping comfortably, significantly impacting one's quality of life. Early diagnosis and treatment are crucial to prevent long-term complications and restore normal shoulder movement.
